query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_credentials (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  credentialId VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  publicKey TEXT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  deviceType ENUM('platform', 'cross-platform') NOT NULL,
  deviceInfo VARCHAR(255),
  counter BIGINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastUsedAt TIMESTAMP NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS biometric_credentials (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  credentialId VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  publicKey TEXT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  deviceType ENUM('platform', 'cross-platform') NOT NULL,
  deviceInfo VARCHAR(255),
  counter BIGINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastUsedAt TIMESTAMP NULL
);
